sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33144" key="e)kfanta/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκφαντ-άζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n33144.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">form in imagination</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:1:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
